meaning: n.可防卫性,防卫的可能性
examples: Defensibility is also taken into consideration when settling an area.
Defensibility is a necessary character of excellent dwelling environment.
Defensibility is of great value in the research of the plan and construction of Chinese traditional villages.
This approach, says Dr Smith, has the virtue of scientific defensibility: science can establish an area's unique characteristics, then branding can advertise it.
